name: InputBase
visual_summary: The InputBase is a basic input field component from Mantine, suitable for when a developer needs to create a form input. It can be used as a standalone input or as part of a more complex form.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: InputBase
Description: The InputBase is a basic input field component from Mantine, suitable for when a developer needs to create a form input. It can be used as a standalone input or as part of a more complex form.
Style: light
Interactions: hover, focusing
Tags: input, form, mantine

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/InputBase/index.ts

export { InputBase } from './InputBase';
